title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the photographs and answer the questions.

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say how the people might be feeling and what kind of support they might need to overcome these challenges.

images.label: A
images.description: A person looking frustrated while trying to fix a leaking pipe under a kitchen sink.

images.label: B
images.description: A business professional standing alone at a podium, looking nervous before a large audience.

images.label: C
images.description: A student looking overwhelmed by a huge stack of books and papers during exam season.

followUp.question: Which of these situations do you think is the most stressful? (Why?)

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say how the weather might be affecting the people's lifestyle and what they might like or dislike about these conditions.

images.label: D
images.description: People walking through a city during a tropical heatwave, using umbrellas for shade.

images.label: E
images.description: A person shoveling thick snow from their driveway in a very cold, wintry landscape.

images.label: F
images.description: People in raincoats walking through a very misty and rainy green countryside.

followUp.question: Which of these climates would you find most difficult to live in? (Why?)
